join_order.notes: Scan p_name.bin (112MB, stride=56) with strstr('green'). Build bitset over p_partkey [0..2000000] = 250KB — fits in L2. Rejects 94.5% of lineitem rows at near-zero cost per row.
s_suppkey_hash: capacity 262144, ~2MB total. Fits entirely in L2 cache. Probe hash32(l_suppkey), linear probe, retrieve s_nationkey. Nation resolved via direct array (n_nationkey = array index).

ps_composite_hash: capacity 16777216, ~192MB. Exceeds L3 (44MB). Composite key = (l_partkey << 32) | (uint32_t)l_suppkey; probe hash64(key). Only ~3.3M lineitem rows survive part filter, so ~3.3M probes total across all threads (~52K/thread). LLC miss penalty is acceptable at this volume.
o_orderkey_hash: capacity 33554432, ~268MB. Fetch o_orderdate (int32 days-since-epoch), extract Gregorian year via JDN conversion. Same ~3.3M probes total.
n_name.bin is 650 bytes. Load into char[25][26] at startup. n_nationkey IS the row index [0..24] — zero-cost lookup, always L1 cache.

filters.notes: Applied once at build phase. Drives bitset construction over p_partkey.

data_structures.part_filter: bitset(2000001) — 250KB bool array indexed by p_partkey; built once, shared read-only across all threads
data_structures.supplier_lookup: pre_built_index: s_suppkey_hash mmap'd (~2MB, fits L2); probe hash32 + linear open-addressing
data_structures.partsupp_lookup: pre_built_index: ps_composite_hash mmap'd (~192MB); probe hash64 on int64 composite key; int64 sentinel = -1LL
data_structures.orders_lookup: pre_built_index: o_orderkey_hash mmap'd (~268MB); probe hash32 on l_orderkey; fetch o_orderdate for year extraction
data_structures.nation_lookup: flat_array: char n_name[25][26] loaded at startup (650 bytes); indexed directly by s_nationkey
data_structures.aggregation: direct_array: double thread_agg[25][7] per thread (1400 bytes, L1 cache); year_idx = extracted_year - 1992; nation_idx = s_nationkey

parallelism.notes: Divide lineitem 59,986,052 rows into ~600 morsels of 100K rows. Each thread claims morsels from atomic counter. Thread-local agg[25][7] avoids all synchronization during scan. Single reduction pass sums thread-local arrays after all morsels complete.

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: l_suppkey → supplier row index → s_nationkey
join_lookup: (l_partkey<<32 | l_suppkey) → partsupp row index → ps_supplycost
join_lookup: l_orderkey → orders row index → o_orderdate

aggregation_details.structure: double agg[25][7] per thread; nation_idx = s_nationkey [0..24]; year_idx = year - 1992
aggregation_details.merge: sum 64 thread-local arrays element-wise into final agg[25][7] after scan completes

output.sort_key: strcmp on n_name[nation_idx] (26-byte fixed strings) for primary; year desc for secondary
